subject: Re: Warp on Linux installation issue
body:
Hi Alister,

Thanks for the reply.

It is funny that I just leave it there for an overnight, and it finally
solved the environment and I have installed warp using conda.

Have not tested the installation, but it finished without any error
messages. I guess it should work fine.

Thanks and happy thanksgiving!

Best
Yunjie

On Mon, Nov 25, 2024 at 10:57 PM Alister Burt <alisterburt@gmail.com> wrote:

> Hi Yunjie,
>
> Problems solving environments typically happen when people install a bunch
> of things into their base environment. You might also be using the conda
> solver rather than mamba, conda can be slow. I would recommend nuking your
> conda installation and starting again with the latest version of mambaforge
> :-)
>
> Miniforge Releases <https://conda-forge.org/miniforge/>
> conda-forge.org <https://conda-forge.org/miniforge/>
> <https://conda-forge.org/miniforge/> <https://conda-forge.org/miniforge/>
>
> Cheers,
>
> Alister
>
> Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
>
> On Nov 24, 2024, at 21:42, Yunjie Chang <changyj0821@gmail.com> wrote:
>
> ﻿Hi warp list,
>
> I am trying to install warp on my linux workstation (Ubuntu 22.04, nvidia
> 4090). Using this command:
> conda create -n warp warp -c warpem -c nvidia/label/cuda-11.8.0 -c pytorch
> -c conda-forge
>
> However, after I hit enter in the terminal, it is just keep "Solving
> environment". I have waited for hours and nothing changed.
>
> Any idea to solve this issue?
>
> Best
> Yunjie
>
> --
> You received this message because you are subscribed to the Google Groups
> "Warp" group.
> To unsubscribe from this group and stop receiving emails from it, send an
> email to warp-em+unsubscribe@googlegroups.com.
> To view this discussion visit
> https://groups.google.com/d/msgid/warp-em/d13e7e67-d4cc-4d70-b3d8-d92d91441b17n%40googlegroups.com
> <https://groups.google.com/d/msgid/warp-em/d13e7e67-d4cc-4d70-b3d8-d92d91441b17n%40googlegroups.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=footer>
> .
>
>

-- 

Best
Yunjie Chang
